name: Good'n Easy Stew
recipeIngredient: 3 pounds lean stewing beef, cut into 1 1/2-inch chunks
1/2 cup sauterne wine or beef broth
1 can cream of mushroom soup (10.5 oz) or cream of celery soup
1 can sliced mushrooms, drained (4 oz), optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a Crock-Pot.
2. Cover and cook on Low for 10 to 12 hours.
3. If desired, thicken the gravy.
Serves 8
